metadata.name: Operate a Robotic Arm in Space

description: An operator on the ground needs to command a robotic arm on a satellite to grab and reposition a payload.

nodes.task_description: Plan the path of the robotic arm, ensuring it will not collide with any other part of the satellite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a safe, collision-free path for the arm.

nodes.task_description: Send the commands to move the arm along the planned path.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the commands and monitors the arm's movement via video feed.

nodes.task_description: Command the arm's end effector to grapple the payload and then move it to its new position.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully grapples and moves the payload.
